summary: Revision 1 resolves the QA dependency-order findings: both client tasks now depend on the economy/population and route/transport tasks they consume, the M2 task graph remains acyclic, downstream M2 implementation tasks remain DRAFT, and the systems revision handoff is schema-valid.

tests_run.result: Modified coordination files remain: project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, project/tasks/thread-registry.json. Untracked M2 task files, systems/QA handoffs, and route files are present; no product code, package, app, content, or docs implementation files appeared in status.
M2-TASK-GRAPH-001 is REVIEW; all 11 downstream M2 tasks remain DRAFT; prior foundation, SIM, PROCESS, and M1-GATE tasks are CLOSED.
No output while M2-TASK-GRAPH-001 remains in REVIEW.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON/DAG validation for all project/tasks/active/M2-*.json, including explicit assertion of the two fixed dependency edges
tests_run.result: Parsed and shape-checked 12 M2 task files; DAG acyclic; dependencies known; M2-CLIENT-MAP-001 depends on M2-ROUTE-TRANSPORT-001 and M2-ECON-POP-001; M2-CLIENT-DISTRICT-LIST-001 depends on M2-ECON-POP-001 and M2-ROUTE-TRANSPORT-001; downstream M2 tasks remain DRAFT.
Tracked diffs are limited to coordination state files: project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, project/tasks/thread-registry.json.
Untracked files are M2 task JSON files, M2-TASK-GRAPH systems/QA handoffs, and M2-TASK-GRAPH route records.

decisions: M2-CLIENT-MAP-001 now has the required dependencies on M2-ROUTE-TRANSPORT-001 and M2-ECON-POP-001.
M2-CLIENT-DISTRICT-LIST-001 now has the required dependencies on M2-ECON-POP-001 and M2-ROUTE-TRANSPORT-001.
Acceptance criteria were not narrowed; the revision is dependency-order only.

The broader M2 coverage remains acceptable: fixture/source policy, seasonal curves, economy/population, route/transport, content guards, boot-boundary follow-up, host-hash follow-up, client map/list, pressure validation, and M2 exit validation remain represented.
risks: Pre-existing coordination-state changes and route files remain for lead_orchestrator integration.
Downstream M2 tasks are still unimplemented DRAFT tasks and require their own writer handoffs, required tests, and independent reviews before any M2 milestone acceptance claim.
requested_action: Integrate the accepted M2-TASK-GRAPH-001 Revision 1 planning task if lead gates pass; do not treat this QA accept as acceptance of any downstream M2 implementation task.
